Poseidon Networking — Monitoring

Poseidon Networking exposes SNMP v3 counters for every interface, route, and firewall chain. Packet capture is available on demand through the management API. Alerts trigger when interface error rates exceed configured thresholds or when BGP sessions flap more than three times in five minutes. Poseidon Networking SNMP v3 counters expose per-interface, per-route, and per-chain metrics. Poseidon Networking packet capture is available through the management API for live debugging.
